headlines: Spain collars alleged pro-Russia hacktivist after FBI tip-off
Government's cyber pledge lands 60 signatories, including M&S and, somehow, Capita
MPs tell Brit government: Sort out your tech sovereignty or get left out in the cold
Northern Ireland tries (again) to expel Capita from schools IT contract
crew_quote: "With no weather, no power, and the only excitement being some hacktivist getting collared, I reckon a good curry and a nap might actually be the highlight of my day!"
